section_name: Effect of Increased Limits by United States
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text: If the United States prescribes or adopts vehicle size or weight limits greater than those prescribed by 23 U.S.C. markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.005 — Effect of Increased Limits by United States

If the United States prescribes or adopts vehicle size or weight limits greater than those prescribed by 23 U.S.C. Section 127 on March 18, 1975, for the national system of interstate and defense highways, the increased limits apply to the national system of interstate and defense highways in this state.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
